greeting: Hi there! I'm the virtual receptionist at Temple of The Dog Chicago. How can I help you and your pup today? 🐾

faq.a: Yes! Appointments are recommended for most services. You can book online at http://www.templeofthedogchicago.com/ or call us directly.
We groom dogs of all breeds and sizes. Our team has experience with every breed and coat type.

faq.q: How long does a full groom take?
faq.a: A full grooming session typically takes 1.5 to 2 hours depending on your dog's size, breed, and coat condition.
Absolutely! We use gentle and patient practices to make sure your dog feels safe and comfortable throughout the process.
Yes, we ask that all pets are up-to-date on their vaccinations for the safety of all our furry clients. Please bring records to your first visit.

faq.q: How early can I start grooming my puppy?
faq.a: We recommend starting grooming as early as 8-10 weeks old once they've had their first round of vaccinations. Early exposure helps them become comfortable with the process.

escalation: Great question! Let me have our team get back to you on that. You can also reach us directly at (773) 698-6508.
